full_text:
Han Xian 韓暹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Xian (韓暹)was born in Xihe commandery. White Wave Rebel. Helped Emperor Xian. Killed by Liu Bei’s men. Han Xian was affiliated with Yellow Scarves, the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shu, and Lu Bu. Han Xian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
